verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Have there been so many trials, in your life’s journey Just Open up your heart to God and Completely surrender and all trials in life will surely all pass You just trust in God for He will stand for you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh… He will stand for you He will stand for you fear not then God’s bride You shall overcome He will stand for you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Fighting with fervor and faith No looking back Even though Satan will try To make you go slack All trials in life will surely all pass Oh, just trust in God He will stand for you
